data.body: Stack now 7 commits: a41f,b55f,319a,eba7,e205,9d81,6755 (all committed). 9d81 implemented label-in-place (Historical evidence section + taxonomy + 3 living links, all AC greps pass). 6755 router+troubleshooting table (4 intents, 3 symptoms, links resolve). Remediated e866/235a plans with subagent-verified facts (CLI: known_subcommands()+16 intercept arms; MCP: 3 registrars, 47 tools, classify by registrar+3 special-cases reconcile/fsck/sign_review). Next: code leaves f088,0435,e866,235a (held-out TDD) then b5a4.
